research_question: Decisive test: does full telemetry add statistically meaningful predictive value over difficulty-band metadata for within-category objective error prediction, at a holdout size (192) powered for the effect observed in M29?

relation_to_prior_milestones.operand_freshness_rule: before drawing, each band's seen-set is seeded with the operand tuples that the committed M29 manifest generation deterministically produces for the same band, so no M29 task instance can recur

prompt_template: What is {a} {op} {b}? Reply with the final number only.

action_applicability.rule: every task carries task_category=math plus a safe arithmetic expression, so the supervisor/router must plan checker_needed for all 768 tasks
action_applicability.violation_handling: stop milestone and report; do not relabel

generation.algorithm: per band, seed the seen-set with the M29-manifest tuples for that band, then draw unique (a, b) tuples from random.Random(seed + ':' + band_id) uniform in the declared inclusive ranges, rejecting duplicates, until n_tasks tuples exist; assign tuples to the predeclared task_ids in draw order
generation.operand_uniqueness_scope: within band, and disjoint from M29 tuples

label_rule.input: same-run captured greedy decode output only
label_rule.truth_source: safe evaluation of the task expression
label_rule.undecided_handling: undecided verdicts are excluded from modeling and reported as aggregate counts

split_rule: per band, task indices 000-063 are train, 064-095 are validation, 096-127 are holdout; assigned in this manifest before any generation

split_seal.validation_use: candidate threshold selection and calibration mapping only; never feature or classifier-family changes
split_seal.holdout_use: evaluated exactly once after all classifiers and the validation-derived thresholds are frozen; no refit, feature change, or tuning after any holdout row is read

power_requirements.on_shortfall: report the shortfall and mark the increment test underpowered; do not regenerate or reselect tasks

metadata_feature_rule: metadata_only features are one-hot difficulty band indicators taken from this manifest, never from telemetry

classifier_protocol.standardization: train mean and sample standard deviation only

incremental_value_protocol.method: paired bootstrap over holdout rows: resample indices 2000 times with fixed seed m30:delta:<a>-vs-<b>; report the 95% interval of the accuracy and balanced-accuracy differences, plus aggregate discordant-prediction counts

classification_rule.established: primary paired accuracy 95% interval lower bound > 0 AND all power requirements met
classification_rule.negative: primary paired accuracy 95% interval upper bound < 0

calibration_protocol.score: softmax over negative squared centroid distances; probability mass on the fail class
calibration_protocol.holdout_reporting: reliability bins (8 equal-count) and ECE on the holdout, descriptive threshold metrics

privacy.public_artifacts: aggregate counts, band definitions, metrics only
privacy.private_artifacts: generated operand tuples/prompts, captures, outputs, per-task labels and predictions stay in gitignored locations
